reviews.review_description:
With a few improvements this game would be a top tier must play game for gear vr.  Please add gear vr motion controller support!  Some more suggestion:
1.ability to move around map
2.faster bullets
3.maybe some music

developer_response.body:
Hi HogansBreath,
We are working at new update to include motion controller and other news. Thank you very much for your review.

reviews.review_description: Now this game has potential, the waves of enemies are cool, the mind craft blocky graphics gotta go, not being able to use my controller is lame pickles, I get coding and graphics take time, seems this one was rushed for the public to beta test it, I truly believe that your on a good path to make something phenomenal, suggestions would be more realistic graphics instead of mind craft block people, add controller functions and the ability to move your character and a button to reload on your own instead of having to run out of shells, and if you really are on a mission to take us gamers by storm make it multi-player and have a domination mode, it will take us vr gamers to the next level!

developer_response.body: Hi Legitimit, We are working on many improvements like character moves, new missions and others. We hope release a new version very soon. Thank you for your review and suggestions.
